creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Just got this crash as well, just on the older stable/14, so probably no new useful info from  me.
I have the vmcore, just in case.

panic: tcp_do_segment: sent too much
cpuid = 3
time = 1743052191
KDB: stack backtrace:
